issues.title: Duplicated and inconsistent logic in handleIdentify()
issues.description: Function has duplicated code checking 'found' and finding 'eleve' multiple times. Also contains invalid JSX return() in the middle of the function.
issues.example:
const eleve = eleves.find(...); // First time
if (!found) { ... } // Check again?
const eleveFound = eleves.find(...); // Second time!
issues.correction: Refactor to have single flow: validate inputs → find eleve → verify password → save to storage → navigate

issues.title: Type 'any' used for eleves state
issues.description: State should be typed with proper Eleve type instead of 'any[]'
issues.correction: const [eleves, setEleves] = useState<Eleve[]>([]);

issues.title: Inconsistent spelling: 'élèves' vs 'eleves'
issues.description: Variables use 'eleves' but French comments use 'élèves'. Standardize throughout.
issues.example:
const [eleves, setEleves] = useState<any[]>([]); // No accents
but error message: 'liste élèves' // With accents
issues.correction: Either use French 'élèves' everywhere or English 'students'. Suggested: keep 'eleves' in code, use 'élèves' only in French UI strings.

issues.title: Invalid comment structure at file start
issues.description: File starts with comment containing file path, which is redundant and unprofessional
issues.example:
// CameraType n'est pas une valeur, utiliser Camera.Constants.Type.front
// app/(tabs)/adhesion.tsx
issues.correction: Keep first comment only, remove path comment

issues.title: FileSystemLegacy import with legacy API
issues.description: Importing from 'expo-file-system/legacy' which is deprecated. Should use main FileSystem module.
issues.correction: Replace with standard FileSystem and update all usages

issues.title: Invalid placeholder comment
issues.description: Comment '...existing code...' suggests incomplete refactoring
issues.correction: Remove placeholder comments or complete the implementation

issues.title: Hardcoded API key exposed in source
issues.description: API key 'KEYOFSQUAD01@' is exposed in source code
issues.correction: Move to expo-constants or .env file: const API_KEY = Constants.expoConfig?.extra?.apiKey;

issues.title: Ambiguous variable name 'list'
issues.description: Variable 'list' doesn't clearly indicate what it contains - techniques, evaluations, or items?
issues.correction: Rename to 'items' or 'techniques' with clear type annotation

issues.title: Fragile belt filename construction
issues.description: Special case for Krav-Maga 'Jaune' → 'Yellow' is hardcoded and undocumented. API structure not validated.
issues.correction: Create mapping object: const beltFileMap = { 'Krav-Maga/Jaune': 'Yellow', ... }

issues.title: Commented import not removed
issues.description: Import from 'react-native-picker/picker' is commented out but left in file
issues.correction: Remove commented imports entirely

issues.title: Invalid JSX syntax - comment-only conditional
issues.description: JSX conditional contains only a comment, which is invalid syntax
issues.correction: Either implement the modal or remove the conditional entirely

issues.title: Unused state variable 'qrId'
issues.description: State variable qrId is initialized but never used except in invalid JSX
issues.correction: Remove state and related modal code if not needed, or implement QR functionality completely

issues.title: Duplicate functions fetchFromServer and loadElevesFromServer
issues.description: Two nearly identical functions perform the same task - fetch data from server
issues.example:
const fetchFromServer = async () => { ... same logic ... }
const loadElevesFromServer = async () => { ... same logic ... }
issues.correction: Consolidate into single function, remove duplicate

issues.title: Excessive use of 'any' type
issues.description: Multiple state variables use 'any' type instead of proper TypeScript interfaces
issues.correction: Define proper Course, Event, and other types

issues.title: Dead code comment about removed functionality
issues.description: Comment references removed 'copyLink' function that no longer exists
issues.example:
// ---- copier lien fiche web
// Fonction copyLink retirée
issues.correction: Remove comment about removed functionality

issues.title: Confusing property name 'identifieOnly'
issues.description: Property name mixes French/English: 'identifie' (past participle) is unclear. Should be 'requiresIdentification'
issues.correction: Rename to 'requiresIdentification' and update all filter logic

issues.title: Variable name reuse in nested scope
issues.description: Variable 'card' is reused in inner scope (courseCard): 'const eventsCard = cards.find(card => ...)'
issues.correction: Use different variable name: 'const eventsCard = allCards.find(evtCard => evtCard.key === 'events');'

issues.title: Magic numbers without explanation
issues.description: Array indices [0,6], [0,8] and numbers like 2025-10-18 lack context
issues.example:
const ZONE_C_HOLIDAYS: Array<[string, string]> = [
  ['2025-10-18', '2025-11-03'], // Why these dates?
issues.correction: Add comments: // Toussaint holidays

issues.title: Type definition mismatch for Eleve
issues.description: Type Eleve includes fields that may not be consistent with other Eleve definitions in the project
issues.correction: Create single Eleve interface in separate types.ts file, import everywhere

issues.title: Generic 'any' type in Array.isArray check
issues.description: Response parsing uses generic array without proper typing
issues.correction: Add runtime validation: const arr = validateEleveArray(data);

issues.title: Typo in file path comment
issues.description: Comment mentions 'squat_logo.png' but file is actually 'squad_logo.png'
issues.example: // Make sure the file exists at `assets/images/squat_logo.png`
issues.correction: Change to `assets/images/squad_logo.png`

issues.title: Hardcoded animation delays
issues.description: Animation delays (4500ms, 5000ms) are magic numbers without explanation
issues.correction: Extract to named constants: const SPLASH_SCREEN_DURATION = 5000; const FADE_OUT_START = 4500;

issues.title: Hardcoded URI in source code
issues.description: WebView source URI 'https://cfsd91.com/utilisateur.html' is hardcoded
issues.correction: Extract to constants: const FORM_URI = 'https://cfsd91.com/utilisateur.html';

issues.title: Duplicated iconBgColor check logic
issues.description: Check for 'transparent' or 'none' is duplicated in renderRight
issues.correction: Extract to constant: const isTransparentBg = iconBgColor === 'transparent' || iconBgColor === 'none';

critical.explanation: Remove duplicated logic, invalid JSX return, and clean up the flow. Single responsibility: validate → find → verify → save → navigate.
Fix JSX syntax - can't have comment-only conditional. Either implement fully or remove.

critical.originalCode:
// CameraType n'est pas une valeur, utiliser Camera.Constants.Type.front
// app/(tabs)/adhesion.tsx
critical.correctedCode:
// CameraType n'est pas une valeur, utiliser Camera.Constants.Type.front
// Note: Camera logic removed in favor of expo-image-picker
critical.explanation: Keep relevant comments, remove redundant path comments.

critical.originalCode:
import * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';
import * as FileSystemLegacy from 'expo-file-system/legacy';
critical.explanation: Use modern FileSystem API throughout. Replace FileSystemLegacy usage with FileSystem.

critical.correctedCode:
// Remove this state - QR functionality not implemented yet
// const [qrId, setQrId] = useState<string | null>(null);
critical.explanation: Remove unused state variable if QR modal is not implemented.

medium.explanation: Create proper type definition instead of using 'any'

medium.originalCode:
const fetchFromServer = async () => { ... }

const loadElevesFromServer = async () => { ... }
medium.explanation: Consolidate duplicate functions into single implementation
Use clear variable name 'items' with proper typing instead of ambiguous 'list'

immediate: Fix critical syntax errors in identification.tsx and recapitulatif.tsx before building
Remove or implement the qrId state in recapitulatif.tsx
short_term: Create shared types.ts file for Eleve, Course, Event interfaces
Extract all hardcoded URIs and API keys to configuration file
Remove all 'any' type usage with proper TypeScript interfaces
long_term: Implement ESLint with strict rules to catch these issues automatically
Add TypeScript strict mode: 'strict': true in tsconfig.json
Create code review checklist before commits
Add pre-commit hooks to validate TypeScript compilation
